blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
